title: Left-pack Stack zone clusters without canvas resize
description: Keep Stack zone clusters as far left as possible and keep Stack canvas dimensions stable when the zone overlay is toggled.
completion_notes: Updated stackZoneBlocks packing to reuse the leftmost column for zone clusters whose vertical ranges do not overlap, instead of appending every zone to the far right. Stack/layer now enables stackZoneBlocks regardless of whether the zone overlay is currently active, so toggling zone only adds/removes boxes and does not change component placement or canvas dimensions.
verification: Browser check on http://127.0.0.1:4174/: Stack+2D zone OFF and ON both used viewBox 0 0 1734 981 / width 1734 / height 981; zone ON had minZoneX=40, overlaps=[], AWS Service and RDS inside AWS zone, and no console errors.
handoff: Continue TASK-009 visual polish. Stack layout should stay stable across Add info toggles; zone overlay must not trigger canvas resizing or rightward drift.
